# Baan Perm Sook Hotel (โรงแรมบ้านเพิ่มสุข) — IMPACT Muang Thong

> A peaceful garden-style hotel in Pak Kret, Nonthaburi, just 7-10 minutes (about 3.8 km)
> from IMPACT Muang Thong Thani (IMPACT Arena / Challenger / Exhibition Center). Pet-friendly
> rooms, free breakfast and spacious free parking. Rooms from ฿1,090/night. Rated 4.2/5 on
> Google from 128 reviews. Best for concert & event goers, business travellers, and pet owners.
> Booking is via LINE, phone, or an on-site enquiry form. Website is bilingual (Thai / English).

## Key facts
- Name: โรงแรมบ้านเพิ่มสุข อิมแพ็ค เมืองทอง / Baan Perm Sook Hotel
- Address: ซอยติวานนท์-ปากเกร็ด 34 (ซอยงบประมาณ), ต.บางพูด อ.ปากเกร็ด จ.นนทบุรี 11120, Thailand
- Distance to IMPACT Muang Thong Thani: ~7-10 minutes (~3.8 km)
- Phone: 094-962-5955 (+66 94 962 5955), available 24 hours
- LINE: @Baanpermsook — https://line.me/ti/p/FI5YYjJS-X
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/baan.permsook.2024
- Google rating: 4.2/5 (128 reviews)
- Check-in: 14:00 · Check-out: 12:00 · 24-hour staff / late check-in OK
- Rooms & prices: Standard (queen bed, 2 guests) ฿1,090/night · Family (up to 4 guests) ฿1,890/night · Pet Friendly ฿1,090+/night
- Pet policy: dogs and cats welcome, 300 THB care fee per pet
- Included: breakfast, free Wi-Fi, air conditioning, TV, hot water, free parking
- Nearby: Central Chaengwattana (10-15 min), MRT Purple Line Pak Kret (15-20 min), Don Mueang Airport (25-30 min)
- Booking: direct is cheapest; free date change with 2 days' notice; no hidden fees

## Main pages
- [Home (Thai)](https://www.baanpermsook.com/): overview, rooms, reviews, gallery, FAQ, booking form, map
- [Home (English)](https://www.baanpermsook.com/en/): English version of the landing page
- [Events at IMPACT + nearby stay](https://www.baanpermsook.com/events.html): upcoming concerts/expos at IMPACT with book-nearby CTA
